business_ideas.idea: Outsourced talent marketplace: connect Western startups with vetted engineers from Sri Lanka.
Content marketing B2B agency or niche marketplace for struggling tech stocks needing writers.
Morning Brew for AI: newsletter covering AI tools, then build portfolio of AI side projects.
AI tools holding company: bundle small 50k-150k ARR AI side projects under one brand.

predictions.text: Newsletter businesses follow same playbook as Morning Brew and The Hustle, very replicable.
Highest risk with AI tools is durability when models improve and apps consolidate into one.
Person can become successful CEO and still want passive income and eventually step back.
